exploration_notes: The task adds a cuDNN runtime version API (`versionRuntimeCuDNN`) to the CUDA hooks interface and updates dispatching heuristics to use it. The 7 files form a clear chain: (1) CUDAHooksInterface.h declares the virtual `versionRuntimeCuDNN()`, (2) CUDAHooks.h declares the override, (3) CUDAHooks.cpp implements it using `cudnnGetVersion()` (with static cuDNN fallback), (4) Context.h exposes a static convenience wrapper. The consumers are: (5) ConvUtils.h `cudnn_conv_suggest_memory_format` still us
